project: Rozvoj kapacit v kyberbezpecnosti v Argentine
title: Rozvoj kapacit v kyberbezpecnosti v Argentine

metadata.agency: Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Czech Republic
metadata.program: Posilovani kapacit verejnych vysokych skol v rozvojovych zemich - vyhlaseni dotacniho programu pro rok 2025

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: Capacity development in cybersecurity in the Republic of Argentina through: i) the creation/updating of a cybersecurity curriculum, ii) technical assistance, and iii) knowledge transfer and skills enhancement through mobility.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Rysavy Ondrej, doc. Ing., Ph.D. (DIFS) – research leader Matousek Petr, doc. Ing., Ph.D., M.A. (DIFS) Studena Michaela, Ing. (External relations) Vesely Vladimir, Ing., Ph.D. (DIFS) Vrska Ludek (DFIT-ISD) Zemcik Pavel, prof. Dr. Ing., dr. h. c. (DCGM)
